tasks.subject: Task 0: Pre-Flight Verification
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Resolve three implementation-time unknowns before writing any code.

**Files:**
- Read: BO/script/chatgpt/script_launch_crawl_csv.php (top — include chain)
- Read: BO/admin/.../scrapping_produit_ia/fonctions/fonctions_scrapping.php (require_once block)
- Read sibling pct_*_rindra_BO.php for auth gate convention
- Search: 8 detectBatchUrls() callsites for use_nlp_detection=false
- Search: 6 non-detection callers of call_api_hellopro

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] Confirmed include chain for script_launch_crawl_csv.php
- [ ] Confirmed no caller passes use_nlp_detection=false
- [ ] Recorded auth gate path used by sibling BO ponctuel scripts
- [ ] Listed 6 non-detection callers of call_api_hellopro

**Verify:** Findings written to D:/DevHellopro/Marketplace/temp/preflight_detection_contract.md

```json:metadata
{"files": ["temp/preflight_detection_contract.md"], "verifyCommand": "test -f D:/DevHellopro/Marketplace/temp/preflight_detection_contract.md", "acceptanceCriteria": ["include chain confirmed", "use_nlp_detection findings recorded", "auth gate path recorded", "non-detection callers listed"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 1: Add Exception Classes
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Create the typed exception hierarchy used by detectBatchUrls() and downstream callers.

**Files:**
- Create: BO/admin/repertoire_test/moulinettes_interne/scrapping_produit_ia/fonctions/DetectionApiException.php

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] File exists at the exact path
- [ ] PHP syntax check passes
- [ ] DetectionApiException extends Exception
- [ ] DetectionApiBackpressureException extends DetectionApiException
- [ ] File doc comment present

**Verify:** php -l 'D:/DevHellopro/Marketplace/BO/admin/repertoire_test/moulinettes_interne/scrapping_produit_ia/fonctions/DetectionApiException.php' → No syntax errors detected

```json:metadata
{"files": ["BO/admin/repertoire_test/moulinettes_interne/scrapping_produit_ia/fonctions/DetectionApiException.php"], "verifyCommand": "php -l 'D:/DevHellopro/Marketplace/BO/admin/repertoire_test/moulinettes_interne/scrapping_produit_ia/fonctions/DetectionApiException.php'", "acceptanceCriteria": ["file created", "php lint clean", "two class declarations correct", "subclass relationship correct"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 2: Extend call_api_hellopro (Additive)
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Add response-header capture + optional connect timeout to the shared HTTP wrapper without changing any existing caller's behavior.

**Files:**
- Modify: BO/fonctions/fonctions_hellopro.php lines 425–491

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] Signature gains &$responseHeaders=[] and ?int $connectTimeout=null trailing
- [ ] CURLOPT_HEADERFUNCTION callback added; populates lowercased keys
- [ ] CURLOPT_CONNECTTIMEOUT set ONLY when $connectTimeout !== null
- [ ] Existing body byte-identical except additions
- [ ] PHP syntax check passes
- [ ] 6 non-detection caller files still lint clean

**Verify:** php -l on wrapper file + sample-lint 3 baseline caller files from Task 0.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["BO/fonctions/fonctions_hellopro.php"], "verifyCommand": "php -l 'D:/DevHellopro/Marketplace/BO/fonctions/fonctions_hellopro.php'", "acceptanceCriteria": ["signature additive", "header callback works", "connect timeout conditional", "6 baseline callers still lint"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 3: Refactor detectBatchUrls + Constants + require_once
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Replace detectBatchUrls() body with retry-loop wrapper enforcing 180s/10s timeouts, 503-only retries honoring Retry-After, exponential backoff, typed exceptions, observable error_log.

**Files:**
- Modify: BO/admin/repertoire_test/moulinettes_interne/scrapping_produit_ia/fonctions/fonctions_scrapping.php

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] require_once 'DetectionApiException.php' added
- [ ] 4 constants: DETECTION_REQUEST_TIMEOUT_S=180, DETECTION_CONNECT_TIMEOUT_S=10, DETECTION_MAX_RETRIES=2, DETECTION_BACKOFF_BASE_S=2
- [ ] Signature unchanged
- [ ] Retry loop: 3 attempts max, only on HTTP 503
- [ ] Wait precedence: Retry-After > backoff_base * 2**attempt
- [ ] DetectionApiBackpressureException on 503 exhausted
- [ ] DetectionApiException on transport/4xx/non-503-5xx
- [ ] error_log only on 503 paths
- [ ] PHP lint clean
- [ ] 5 untouched callsite files still lint

**Verify:** php -l on fonctions_scrapping.php + sanity-lint 4 untouched callsite files.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["BO/admin/repertoire_test/moulinettes_interne/scrapping_produit_ia/fonctions/fonctions_scrapping.php"], "verifyCommand": "php -l 'D:/DevHellopro/Marketplace/BO/admin/repertoire_test/moulinettes_interne/scrapping_produit_ia/fonctions/fonctions_scrapping.php'", "acceptanceCriteria": ["require_once added", "4 constants declared", "signature preserved", "retry loop correct", "typed exceptions thrown", "error_log only on 503/exhaustion", "5 untouched callsites lint clean"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 4: Migrate script_launch_crawl_csv.php Bypass Functions
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Refactor detectFrenchBatch() and detectFrenchSingle() to delegate to detectBatchUrls(), eliminating the two callsites that bypass the contract.

**Files:**
- Modify: BO/script/chatgpt/script_launch_crawl_csv.php lines 221–264
- Conditional: add require_once for fonctions_scrapping.php at top if Task 0 found no transitive include

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] detectFrenchBatch delegates to detectBatchUrls(items, BATCH_SIZE, 'complete', false)
- [ ] detectFrenchSingle delegates to detectBatchUrls([['url'=>$url]], 1, 'complete', false), extracts results[0]
- [ ] Both wrap call in try/catch (DetectionApiBackpressureException, DetectionApiException), return [] / null
- [ ] error_log lines with [script_launch_crawl_csv] prefix
- [ ] Conditional require_once added if needed
- [ ] PHP lint clean
- [ ] No callers need changes (return shapes preserved)

**Verify:** php -l 'D:/DevHellopro/Marketplace/BO/script/chatgpt/script_launch_crawl_csv.php' → No syntax errors detected

```json:metadata
{"files": ["BO/script/chatgpt/script_launch_crawl_csv.php"], "verifyCommand": "php -l 'D:/DevHellopro/Marketplace/BO/script/chatgpt/script_launch_crawl_csv.php'", "acceptanceCriteria": ["detectFrenchBatch delegates", "detectFrenchSingle delegates with single-item batch", "typed catches with error_log", "return shapes preserved"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 5: Add Smoke Verification Script
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Provide a runnable CLI/browser script that exercises the contract paths for pre-merge regression checks and post-deploy smoke tests.

**Files:**
- Create: BO/admin/repertoire_test/moulinettes_rindra/script_divers/ponctuel/pct_smoke_detection_contract_rindra_BO.php

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] File exists at exact path
- [ ] CLI/browser dual-mode bootstrap
- [ ] require_once for fonctions_scrapping.php with __DIR__-relative path
- [ ] Test 1: detectBatchUrls happy path on lemonde.fr
- [ ] Test 2: 503 backpressure try/catch (skipped if not saturated)
- [ ] Test 3: is_a() assertions on exception hierarchy
- [ ] Test 4: backward-compat call_api_hellopro signature on /api/v1/health
- [ ] PHP lint clean

**Verify:** php -l 'D:/DevHellopro/Marketplace/BO/admin/repertoire_test/moulinettes_rindra/script_divers/ponctuel/pct_smoke_detection_contract_rindra_BO.php'

```json:metadata
{"files": ["BO/admin/repertoire_test/moulinettes_rindra/script_divers/ponctuel/pct_smoke_detection_contract_rindra_BO.php"], "verifyCommand": "php -l 'D:/DevHellopro/Marketplace/BO/admin/repertoire_test/moulinettes_rindra/script_divers/ponctuel/pct_smoke_detection_contract_rindra_BO.php'", "acceptanceCriteria": ["dual-mode bootstrap", "4 tests present", "lint clean"]}
```
